abstract: This paper demonstrates that marketers can leverage recent advances in machine learning, GANs, to tackle customer data transfer while preserving privacy.

affiliation: Marketing Department, Jones Graduate School of Business, Rice University, Houston, Texas 77005;
authors_full.name: Piyush Anand

ob.ai_reason: GANs深度学习解决隐私问题，AI是核心方法
ob.tldr: 研究利用GAN在客户数据传输中保护隐私并实现规模化。实验表明GAN可生成高质量合成数据，兼顾隐私和可扩展性。

title: Using Deep Learning to Overcome Privacy and Scalability Issues in Customer Data Transfer
title_zh: 深度学习解决客户数据传输中的隐私与可扩展性问题
